0.text: Diffuse ground-glass opacities in both lung parenchyma

2.text: Subpleural striations in the anterior segment of the left upper lobe, the lingular segment, and the basal segments of both lower lobes

3.text: Subsegmental atelectasis in the anterior segment of the left upper lobe, the lingular segment, and the basal segments of both lower lobes

4.text: 7.7 mm nodular density adjacent to the fissure in the superior segment of the right lower lobe
